docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,600.00 FILED BY OKONKWO, URSULINE AS TO DEFENDANT HARDATT, DEVINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OKONKWO, URSULINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARDATT, DEVINA $1,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,465.00, COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO RECEIVE A TOTAL REFUND OF $1,200, ONE HALF MONTH'S RENT FOR FAILURE TO PROVIDE (1) SERVICES AT EARLY PART OF LEASE AND (2) TO PROVIDE SOME COMPENSATION FOR LATER DISCOURTEOUS AND HARASING TREATMENT. COURT FINDS THE CLEANING SERVICE FEE IS NOT RECOVERABLE AGAINST THE SECURITY DEPOSIT SINCE SUBTENANT HAD THE UNIT PROFESSIONALLY CLEANED BEFORE MOVING OUT. OTHER COMPUTATION BY MASTER TENANT ON RETURN OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT ARE CORRECT AND CONFORM TO THE LEASE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT HARDATT, DEVINA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HARDATT, DEVINA
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $1,569.76 RE 36467 FOR TRANSACTION W0520B06D001 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO URSULINE ONKONKWO, DOC#1910731525, WARRANT #38206555, DATED JAN-14-2021

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-03-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-03-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF HARDATT OKONKWO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DEVINA HARDATT IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFFS CELL PHONE VIDEO OF INCIDENTS ARE PLAYED FOR THE JUDGE AND DEFENDANT IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF OKONKWO, URSULINE AS TO DEFENDANT HARDATT, DEVINA
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 02/19/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARAD."
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS.*ACCOUNTING NOTIFIED BY EMAIL* 2ND REQUEST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OKONKWO, URSULINE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-08-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HARDATT, DEVINA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2020 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BY DEFENDANT HARDATT, DEVINA
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS. *ACCOUNTING NOTIFIED BY EMAIL* FILED BY PLAINTIFF OKONKWO, URSULINE
